_comment: Source-of-truth config for generating builds/*.json. Add a build here, then run: python tools/gen_build.py (optionally <build-id> to regenerate just one). Inputs are pulled from the maxroll planner + game-data dictionary; nothing in builds/ should be hand-edited.

builds.name: Shield of Retribution Paladin
builds.notes: Auto-extracted from the maxroll planner (Endgame profile). Uniques have fixed affixes; the first affix listed is the Greater Affix / masterwork priority. Rare slots show the affix priority to roll for.

builds.name: Evade Counterswarm Spiritborn
builds.notes: Auto-extracted from the maxroll planner (Endgame 3.0.3 profile). Uniques have fixed affixes; the first affix listed is the Greater Affix / masterwork priority. Rare slots show the affix priority to roll for.
